title: stachys inflata subsp. caucasica
intro: Stachys inflata subsp. caucasica, also known as Caucasus betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys inflata plant, a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation, calm the nervous system, and act as a sedative. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, Stachys inflata subsp. caucasica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in herbal blends for its calming and soothing effects.
